# amritpal.work

> Personal portfolio of Amritpal Singh, a Fullstack Developer specializing in SaaS platforms, scalable web applications, backend architecture, and performance optimization.

## About

Amritpal Singh is a Fullstack Developer based in India, building scalable SaaS platforms and high-performance web applications using cutting-edge technologies. He delivers complete solutions from frontend UX to backend architecture.

## Services

- Fullstack Web Development
- SaaS Platform Architecture
- Backend API Development
- Performance Optimization
- Scalable Application Design
- Modern Frontend Development

## Tech Stack

- **Frontend**: React, TypeScript
- **Backend**: Node.js, ElysiaJS
- **Databases**: PostgreSQL, Redis
- **Mobile**: Expo
- **Cloud**: AWS

## Availability

Available for freelance projects, consulting, and full-time opportunities.
